title: Feature Request: Allow One notification per group
excerpt: Currently, we are getting notifications on every single item in a group, when we really just want a single notification when everything in the group is completed.  The ability to allow for only one notification per group…

posts.author: jaimes (Jaimes)
posts.cookedHtml: Currently, we are getting notifications on every single item in a group, when we really just want a single notification when everything in the group is completed. The ability to allow for only one notification per group in notification automations would be extremely helpful to reduce the clutter of notificaitons.

posts.author: phoebemb (Phoebe Ballantyne)
posts.cookedHtml: I would also love to see notifications grouped by line item, rather than the entire group.
